## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and upcoming plans.](https://fathom.video/share/3beD7-abPr6cPQmyaTwuL1FHuD5zDC7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content staging completed ahead of schedule; new articles published for current week](https://fathom.video/share/3beD7-abPr6cPQmyaTwuL1FHuD5zDC7A?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [Slight dip in overall traffic, but non-branded performance continues upward trend](https://fathom.video/share/3beD7-abPr6cPQmyaTwuL1FHuD5zDC7A?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [New content categories (e.g., AI agents for finance) showing promise](https://fathom.video/share/3beD7-abPr6cPQmyaTwuL1FHuD5zDC7A?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [New Statement of Work (SoW) to be discussed next week with Marcel and Tiago](https://fathom.video/share/3beD7-abPr6cPQmyaTwuL1FHuD5zDC7A?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)

## Topics

### Website Migration Status

  - [Desktop version functioning, mobile experiencing timeouts](https://fathom.video/share/3beD7-abPr6cPQmyaTwuL1FHuD5zDC7A?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Migration process ongoing, expected to complete within 1-2 days](https://fathom.video/share/3beD7-abPr6cPQmyaTwuL1FHuD5zDC7A?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Team advised not to worry; deployment likely in progress](https://fathom.video/share/3beD7-abPr6cPQmyaTwuL1FHuD5zDC7A?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)

### Content Strategy & Performance

  - [Articles for current and next week pre-staged in CMS](https://fathom.video/share/3beD7-abPr6cPQmyaTwuL1FHuD5zDC7A?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [Slight traffic dip vs. previous week's peak (Google & LLM)](https://fathom.video/share/3beD7-abPr6cPQmyaTwuL1FHuD5zDC7A?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
      - [Likely seasonal variation; no change in URL positions](https://fathom.video/share/3beD7-abPr6cPQmyaTwuL1FHuD5zDC7A?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Non-branded performance increasing long-term](https://fathom.video/share/3beD7-abPr6cPQmyaTwuL1FHuD5zDC7A?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [New category "AI agents for finance" among best performers](https://fathom.video/share/3beD7-abPr6cPQmyaTwuL1FHuD5zDC7A?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Real estate content also performing well](https://fathom.video/share/3beD7-abPr6cPQmyaTwuL1FHuD5zDC7A?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Established clusters (sales, insurance, automation) maintain strong performance](https://fathom.video/share/3beD7-abPr6cPQmyaTwuL1FHuD5zDC7A?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)

### LLM & Referral Traffic

  - [Overall LLM traffic dipped slightly](https://fathom.video/share/3beD7-abPr6cPQmyaTwuL1FHuD5zDC7A?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [Perplexity referrals hit new high](https://fathom.video/share/3beD7-abPr6cPQmyaTwuL1FHuD5zDC7A?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Referrals account for 14-15% of overall traffic (industry avg \~10%)](https://fathom.video/share/3beD7-abPr6cPQmyaTwuL1FHuD5zDC7A?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)

### Link Building Progress

  - [Proceeding as planned](https://fathom.video/share/3beD7-abPr6cPQmyaTwuL1FHuD5zDC7A?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [Partner report expected next week](https://fathom.video/share/3beD7-abPr6cPQmyaTwuL1FHuD5zDC7A?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)

### New SoW Discussion

  - [Marcel to schedule time with Tiago next week](https://fathom.video/share/3beD7-abPr6cPQmyaTwuL1FHuD5zDC7A?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Team excited to present and receive feedback](https://fathom.video/share/3beD7-abPr6cPQmyaTwuL1FHuD5zDC7A?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)

### Team Updates

  - [Vivek absent past two weeks due to dental emergency](https://fathom.video/share/3beD7-abPr6cPQmyaTwuL1FHuD5zDC7A?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [Mara on leave this week, returning next week](https://fathom.video/share/3beD7-abPr6cPQmyaTwuL1FHuD5zDC7A?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Publish next week's pre-staged content once migration complete](https://fathom.video/share/3beD7-abPr6cPQmyaTwuL1FHuD5zDC7A?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [Await green light from Datagrid team for content publication](https://fathom.video/share/3beD7-abPr6cPQmyaTwuL1FHuD5zDC7A?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Schedule and conduct SoW discussion with Marcel and Tiago](https://fathom.video/share/3beD7-abPr6cPQmyaTwuL1FHuD5zDC7A?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Review link building partner report (expected next week)](https://fathom.video/share/3beD7-abPr6cPQmyaTwuL1FHuD5zDC7A?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Continue monitoring performance of new content categories for potential expansion](https://fathom.video/share/3beD7-abPr6cPQmyaTwuL1FHuD5zDC7A?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
